title: Prohibits the manufacture, sale or distribution of the Rosiglitazone and its formulation_Section

X 11014/5/2010-^hrqfi^fr] ^5T. tj, ~£. lri5T) y'ytW UpcH MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health and Family Welfare) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th November, 2010 G.S.R. 910(E).—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that use of drug formulations containing Rosiglitazone are likely to involve certain risk to human beings; And whereas safer alternatives to the drug are available; And whereas the Central Government is satisfied that it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufac- ture, sale and distribution of this drug in public interest. Now, therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by Section 26-A of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby prohibits the manufacture, sale and distribution of the following drug, with immediate effect, namely:— "Rosiglitazone and its formulations for human use". [F. No. X11014/5/2010-DFQC] Dr. A. K. PANDA, Jt. Secy. 4404 GI/2010 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
